project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

context.role: Aerial obstacle requiring duck or precise jump timing to avoid
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=50px or y=80px (Low/High variants), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Appears after score reaches 200+, forces player to use duck input, 30-40% spawn probability in mid-late game, Low variant (y=50) requires ducking, High variant (y=80) can be passed under

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon/pterodactyl with long beak, extended wings in flight
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients

animation.description: Wing flapping animation - frame 1: wings up position, frame 2: wings down position, seamless loop

visual_specification.details: Long pointed beak, wings clearly extended, flying pose, wing flapping creates sense of movement, hitbox 89x77px (3px margin for forgiveness), two height variants: Low (y=50px) overlaps with player running hitbox requiring duck, High (y=80px) above player allowing pass-through

relationships.shared_with: Same color as all obstacles, animated like player_run and player_duck
relationships.differences_from: All cacti are ground-based (y=0) and static, pterodactyl is aerial (y=50 or 80) and animated, cacti require jump, pterodactyl Low requires duck

explicit_negations: no tail streamers or decorative elements
